name: TimePicker
mdSummary:
# TimePicker

Time-of-day picker with 12h/24h formats.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/time-picker

| TimePicker | SecondStep | `int` | `1` |  |
